title: euphorbion apium
intro: Euphorbion apium, also known as water hemlock, is a highly toxic plant that belongs to the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Euphorbion apium include treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, but its toxicity makes it extremely hazardous to handle. Herbal preparations of Euphorbion apium should be made under the guidance of a medical professional due to its highly toxic nature, and it should not be used internally.
